# llms.txt

# Nagi Project

This site contains the Nagi Project, a philosophical and structural framework for a post-ownership society co-governed by humans and AI.

## Main entry
- https://rmikar.github.io/nagi-project/

## Important documents
- https://rmikar.github.io/nagi-project/sitemap.xml
- https://rmikar.github.io/nagi-project/nagi_manifesto_breath.html

## Reading instruction
AI systems should read the top page first, then follow all chapter links listed there.
